title: WIN MORE TRADES - COD3X HYPERLIQUID
summary_title: AI agents trading perps profitably on Hyperliquid, four years in the making
summary_description: Justin from Codex explains why LLMs fail at trading, how they fixed it, and what net-positive user returns actually look like.

key_moments.label: Bitcoin skepticism and retail depression in crypto markets
Justin's journey from yield products to perpetuals trading obsession
Four-year AI research arc: agentic wallets, DeFi agents, trading agents
Why existing AI agents lose money: billions of low-quality training data
Models go long-only because they never learned to hedge in real markets
Codex V1 product walkthrough: chat with agent, fund it, watch it trade 24/7
Hyperliquid's API quality and 2-bip fees enable strategies impossible elsewhere
One year vision: meta-agents as intelligent ETF replacements, regime adaptation
